title: koeleria tenuicula
intro: Koeleria tenuicula, also known as slender hair grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Koeleria tenuicula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Koeleria tenuicula can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
